title: Lisianthius pulcherrimus
taxonomy: Lisianthius pulcherrimus is classified within the family Gentianaceae, which is a large and diverse family of flowering plants commonly known as the gentian family. This family consists of approximately 1,600 species, many of which are found in tropical and subtropical regions around the world. Lisianthius pulcherrimus is a species of flowering plant in the genus Lisianthus, which is a group of flowering plants that are native to the Americas. The genus Lisianthus is further classified within the family Gentianaceae due to its shared characteristics and similarities with other members of the family. Overall, the classification of Lisianthius pulcherrimus reflects its unique features and evolutionary relationships with other flowering plants.
